MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Edward M. Higginbotham, Esq. for Plaintiff. Plaintiff counsel indicated he would be filing dismissal today. Court orders sanctions previously issued to Edward M. MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STACY STONE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted.
